title: October 13
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|October}}

'''October 13''' is the 286th day of the year (287th in leap years). There are 79 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1950s#1958|1958]] – [[Charity James]] is born.
*[[1950s#1959|1959]] – [[Wayne Pygram]] is born.
*[[1960s#1960|1960]] – [[Richard Sammel]] is born.
*[[1960s#1967|1967]] – [[Laura Cappato]] is born.
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 69|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 69]] published.
*[[1999]] – ''[[The Bounty Hunters: Kenix Kil]]'' published.
*[[2002]] – [[Keene Curtis]] dies.
*[[2005]] – ''[[The Star Wars Poster Book]]'' published.
*[[2009]] – ''[[Death Troopers]]'' published.
*2009 – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Complete Saga]]'' released for [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Microsoft_Windows PC].
*[[2010]] – [[Knight Errant: Aflame 1|''Knight Errant: Aflame'' 1]] published.
*[[2012]] – "[[Front Runners]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2014]] – "[[Droids in Distress]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2019]] – "[[A Quick Salvage Run]]" airs on [[Disney Channel]].
*[[2020]] – "[[Count to Three]]" published on [[Electronic Arts]]' website.
*2020 – ''[[Star Wars: Fascinating Facts]]'' published.
*2020 – ''[[Star Wars Adventures, Volume 10: Driving Force]]'' published.
*[[2021]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2020) 15|''Doctor Aphra'' (2020) 15]] published.
*2021 – [[Star Wars Adventures: Ghosts of Vader's Castle 4|''Star Wars Adventures: Ghosts of Vader's Castle'' 4]] published.
*2021 – [[The High Republic: Trail of Shadows 1|''The High Republic: Trail of Shadows'' 1]] published.
*2021 – [[War of the Bounty Hunters 5|''War of the Bounty Hunters'' 5]] published.
*[[2026]] – [[Star Wars: Boba Fett – Black, White & Red (trade paperback)|''Star Wars: Boba Fett – Black, White & Red'' Treasury Edition]] to be published.
*2026 – ''[[Tales from the Outer Rim: The Legend of Beggar's Canyon]]'' to be published.
<noinclude>
